steps.title: Find the slope from two table points
Build the linear form and find the constant
steps.content: With $f(x) = 4x + b$, plug in $(1, 5)$: $5 = 4(1) + b \Rightarrow b = 1$. So $f(x) = 4x + 1$.

steps.title: Verify with the remaining point
steps.content: Check $(5, 21)$: $4(5) + 1 = 21$. ✓ That matches choice C — C is correct.
